data.body: Refactor serial metadata items so notes, handoff capsules, and step history follow a shared immutable metadata model. Requirements: (1) these records are append-only and immutable once created; corrections must be represented by new follow-up records rather than edits or deletions, so agent-authored notes remain durable; (2) these record types should share a canonical base/interface for lease identity so the lease key is consistent and typed as a lease reference everywhere, rather than ad hoc per-record structure. Scope includes designing the schema/invariants and enforcing them in creation/update paths.
data.title: Normalize immutable metadata items around lease IDs
